booking.title: Consultation Booking
booking.description: A scheduled virtual consultation with Vaidya Dr. Sushil Gaur.

userId.description: UID of the user who scheduled the consultation

notes.description: Patient notes containing physical symptoms and dry vs fluid observations

inquiry.title: Compounding Inquiry
inquiry.description: An inquiry placed for customized traditional medicine compounding.

userId.description: UID of the user placing the compounding request

email.description: Optional email address of the patient

phone.description: Contact number (verified for counter delivery notifications)

totalPrice.description: Total checkout price in Indian Rupees (INR)

items.description: List of compounds queued in the cart

quiz_result.title: Quiz Result
quiz_result.description: Historical record of an Ayurvedic Tridosha evaluation.

userId.description: UID of the user who completed the quiz

doshaResult.description: Breakdown percentages for Vata, Pitta, and Kapha

newsletter_subscriber.title: Newsletter Subscriber
newsletter_subscriber.description: Email address and subscription date for seasonal health tips and remedies.

remedy_feedback.title: Remedy Feedback
remedy_feedback.description: A dynamic review or rating submitted by a customer for an individual catalog remedy.

comment.description: User's written experience or review comment

referral.title: Referral Record
referral.description: A record tracking a referred friend and referral conversion status.

referrerId.description: UID of the user who made the referral

friendEmail.description: Email address of the invited friend

status.description: Current tracking status of the referral

createdAt.description: Server timestamp when invitation was created

/bookings/{bookingId}.description: Virtual Vaidya Google Meet consultation bookings scheduled by patients.

/inquiries/{inquiryId}.description: Traditional compounding recipes queued for counter counter dispensing.

/quiz_results/{resultId}.description: Historical Nadi Pariksha quiz records stored for constitutional monitoring.

/newsletter_subscribers/{subscriberId}.description: Client email records opted in for health newsletters.

/remedy_feedbacks/{feedbackId}.description: Persistent customer reviews and efficacy feedback for each formula.

/referrals/{referralId}.description: Referral tracking records for users who invite friends to join.
